context7-mcp.description: Fetch live library/framework documentation via Context7 MCP instead of training data.

ecc:api-design.description: REST API design — resources, status codes, pagination, error responses, versioning.

ecc:backend-patterns.description: API design, database optimization, server-side patterns for Node.js, Express, Next.js.

ecc:coding-standards.description: Cross-project coding conventions — naming, readability, immutability, code quality.

ecc:continuous-learning-v2.description: Instinct-based learning with confidence scoring — extract patterns into reusable skills.

ecc:database-migrations.description: Schema changes, data migrations, rollbacks, zero-downtime for Prisma/Drizzle/Django.

ecc:deployment-patterns.description: CI/CD pipelines, Docker, health checks, rollback strategies, production readiness.

ecc:docker-patterns.description: Docker Compose, container security, networking, volumes, multi-service orchestration.

ecc:e2e-testing.description: Playwright E2E — Page Object Model, configuration, CI/CD integration, flaky tests.

ecc:frontend-patterns.description: React, Next.js, state management, performance optimization, UI best practices.

ecc:iterative-retrieval.description: Progressive context refinement to solve the subagent context problem.

ecc:postgres-patterns.description: PostgreSQL query optimization, schema design, indexing, and security (Supabase).

ecc:search-first.description: Research existing tools and libraries before writing custom code.

ecc:security-review.description: Security checklist for auth, user input, secrets, API endpoints, payment features.

ecc:tdd-workflow.description: TDD with 80%+ coverage — unit, integration, and E2E tests.

ecc:verification-loop.description: Continuous verification system — checkpoint and eval patterns.

superpowers:brainstorming.description: Design before implementation — clarify intent, propose approaches, write spec.

superpowers:dispatching-parallel-agents.description: Dispatch one agent per independent problem domain concurrently.

superpowers:executing-plans.description: Inline plan execution with checkpoints when subagents are unavailable.

superpowers:finishing-a-development-bran.description: Verify tests, detect environment, present merge/PR/keep/discard options.

superpowers:receiving-code-review.description: Handle incoming code review feedback with technical rigor before implementing.

superpowers:requesting-code-review.description: Dispatch code reviewer subagent with git SHAs after each task or feature.

superpowers:subagent-driven-development.description: Execute plans via fresh subagents with two-stage review per task.

superpowers:systematic-debugging.description: Root cause investigation before any fix. Four-phase debugging protocol.

superpowers:test-driven-development.description: RED-GREEN-REFACTOR cycle. Write failing test before any implementation code.

superpowers:using-git-worktrees.description: Isolated workspace via git worktrees before feature work or plan execution.

superpowers:using-superpowers.description: Bootstrap — skill discovery and invocation protocol. Invoke at session start.

superpowers:verification-before-completi.description: Evidence before claims — run verification commands before any completion statement.

superpowers:writing-plans.description: Create bite-sized TDD implementation plans saved to docs/superpowers/plans/.

superpowers:writing-skills.description: TDD-based skill authoring — RED (baseline) → GREEN (write) → REFACTOR (bulletproof).
